title: Use of eval()
explanation: eval() executes arbitrary code and can lead to remote code execution.

title: Use of exec()
explanation: exec() executes dynamic code which may be unsafe.

title: Subprocess shell usage
explanation: Using shell=True may allow command injection.

title: Hardcoded API key
explanation: Hardcoded secrets should not be stored in source code.

title: Hardcoded password
explanation: Hardcoded credentials can expose sensitive access.

title: Potential XSS via innerHTML
explanation: innerHTML can allow cross-site scripting if user input is inserted.
